title: Final Trump
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''The Final Trump''' was an imaginary [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] hand. On his way to the [[Battle of ThonBoka]], one of the most dangerous situations of his life, [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] had a nightmare in which he was playing sabacc against a mysterious, gray opponent, which was meant to be [[Rokur Gepta]].

His opponent's hand was the Final Trump, which represented an automatic win for whoever held it, a good representation of Lando's fears that he would not survive the coming battle no matter how cunning he was.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

[[Category:Sabacc]]
